about.more_title: TechNest is more than an agency
about.more_p1: We are your technology partner. We were born in 2021 with a clear vision: to democratize access to high-quality digital solutions for businesses and entrepreneurs.
about.more_p2: Our team combines experience in frontend and backend development, UX/UI design, and digital strategy to create products that not only look amazing but also generate real results.

cta.title: Ready to transform your idea?
cta.desc: Schedule a free call and discover how we can help you build your dream digital product.

footer.subtitle: We transform ideas into extraordinary digital experiences. Specialists in web development, UI/UX design, and innovative technological solutions.

steps.title: Discovery & Planning
steps.description: We understand your business, define clear goals, and create a detailed roadmap for your project's success.

steps.title: UI/UX Design
steps.description: We create intuitive and beautiful interfaces that connect with your users and elevate your brand.

steps.title: Agile Development
steps.description: We build your product using the best technologies, ensuring performance, security, and scalability.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.description: We deploy your project and support its growth with continuous maintenance and optimization.

process.videoText: We accompany you at every stage of your project's development.

politicas.subtitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
politicas.intro: Welcome to TechNesst. By accessing and using our services, website, or digital platforms, you accept the following terms and conditions. We recommend carefully reading this Legal Policy before using our services.

portfolio.subtitle: Every project is a success story. Discover how we've helped businesses grow. Here are some of the projects developed at technest:

projects.title: Electric APP
projects.description: Application for the local administration of an electronics store with billing system and inventory control.

projects.title: Restaurant System
projects.description: Restaurant management system with ordering system, billing, and inventory control.

projects.title: HealthTrack
projects.description: Mobile app for health tracking with wearable integration and medical reports.

projects.title: CryptoWatch
projects.description: Cryptocurrency monitoring dashboard with custom alerts and digital portfolio.

projects.title: AI Support Hub
projects.description: Intelligent customer service platform with AI chatbots, ticket automation, and real-time conversational analysis.

projects.title: LogiFlow
projects.description: Real-time logistics and tracking system for delivery management, GPS monitoring, and route optimization.

services.subtitle: Comprehensive technological solutions to push your business to the next level.

about.p1_rest: we develop modern technological solutions designed to help businesses, entrepreneurs, and brands grow in an increasingly competitive digital environment. We specialize in custom software development, web applications, process automation, artificial intelligence, and digital experiences with high visual and functional impact.
about.p2: Our goal is not just to create software, but to build intelligent tools that drive real results. Each project is developed with a strategic approach, combining modern design, performance, scalability, and cutting-edge technologies to ensure solid, fast, and future-ready products.
about.p3: We work on the creation of advanced web platforms, enterprise systems, administrative dashboards, APIs, automations, AI-driven solutions, and interactive experiences that optimize processes, improve productivity, and offer a superior user experience.
about.p4: At TechNest we believe that quality is in every detail. That is why we take care of everything from the system architecture to the visual experience, using modern technologies and professional standards to ensure security, stability, and performance in every solution we deliver.
about.p5: Choosing TechNest means working with a team focused on innovation, commitment, and technological excellence. We are passionate about transforming ideas into real, functional, and visually striking digital products. More than a provider, we seek to become a technological ally capable of accompanying the growth of each client in the long term.
about.p6: We create modern technology for companies that want to evolve, automate, and stand out in the new digital era.

features.title: Computer Vision
